display.label: Bootstrap Servers
display.description: Comma-separated list of Fluss coordinator server addresses (host:port).

display.label: Default Database
display.description: Default Fluss database used when resolving table paths from event destinations.

display.label: Auto-create Tables
display.description: When true, automatically create Fluss tables if they do not exist, deriving the schema from the Debezium event schema. Requires the JSON converter with schemas.enable=true. Default: false

display.label: Maximum Retries
display.description: Maximum number of retry attempts on transient write failures. Default: 5

display.label: Retry Interval
display.description: The initial retry interval in milliseconds. Default: 1000

display.label: Retry Maximum Interval
display.description: The maximum retry interval in milliseconds. Default: 60000

display.label: Retry Backoff Multiplier
display.description: Backoff multiplier for retry intervals. Default: 2.0
